A-42, Phase-1, Naraina Industrial Area, New Delhi, 110028

Careers at Morzze

Join Us

craft the future of luxury living

Our Story

Let's unite
and conquer
together

At Morzze, we don't just make furniture — we shape spaces where life happens. Since 2008, we've been building India's most celebrated luxury furniture brand, one handcrafted piece at a time.

Our team of designers, craftspeople, and innovators share one obsession: creating objects of extraordinary beauty that stand the test of time. If that sounds like you, we want to hear from you.

From The Team

Teammates' Voice

“Morzze gave me the space to push my creative limits. Every project here is a chance to redefine luxury living.”

Priya Nair

Senior Designer, 4 years

Work
Culture

We believe that the best furniture comes from the best environments. That’s why we invest heavily in our workplace — creating spaces where creativity and collaboration flourish naturally.

Intelligence is Creativity Unleashed

We encourage bold ideas and reward innovative thinking across every department.

Passion Over Process

We hire for passion and cultivate skills. If you love what you do, you’ll thrive here.

Excellence Without Compromise

Every product, every interaction, every decision — we hold ourselves to the highest standard.

Let's Team Up

5 positions available

Designer

5-8 years experience

Marketing

4-6 years experience

Manufacturing

Sales

CUSTOMER SERVICE • Full-time

Customer Services

Send a General Application

We're always interested in meeting talented people. Drop your resume and we'll be in touch.
